word: H779 - אָרַר - ʼârar - aw-rar' - [idiom] bitterly curse

sections.paragraph:
Original: ארר

Transliteration: 'ârar

Phonetic: aw-rar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to curse
    1. (Qal)
      1. to curse
      2. cursed be he (participle used pr in curses)
    2. (Niphal) to be cursed, cursed
    3. (Piel) to curse, lay under a curse, put a curse on
    4. (Hophal) to be made a curse, be cursed

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 168

Part(s) of speech: Verb
